meaning: crab [动]邓杰内斯蟹(北美洲太平洋沿岸的大型可食蟹)
examples: It is already hampering the oyster harvest and the Dungeness crab fishery, and it interferes with the recreational use of beaches and waterfronts.
Nick Furman heads Oregon's Dungeness Crab Commission.
A snail at the Dungeness nature reserve in Kent, which has one of the largest areas of vegetated shingle in the world.
In 2009, the previous government dismissed Dungeness as a location for a new nuclear power station.
Supporters believed it would safeguard the economic future of the area after Dungeness Nuclear Power Station closes.
